title: Trump news, schedule and updates for May 28 from Trump Connect
shortDescription: See what President Donald Trump spoke about at the Cabinet meeting yesterday. Plus, the Trump Accounts app is now live. It's the Trump news rundown.

title: Negotiators reach Iran deal, but Trump, Tehran must still sign off
shortDescription: Trump has yet to approve the deal. Iran's leadership also hasn't signed off yet.

title: Trump sanctuary-city threat could snarl NYC World Cup travel
shortDescription: A idea to halt international flights flying into sanctuary-city airports could cause major disruptions for millions of travelers.

title: $250 bill mock-ups feature Trump's portrait. But there's a catch.
shortDescription: Treasury has prepared mock-ups for a new $250 bill featuring President Trump's portrait, but it would need congressional action to be released.

title: Trump 'invited' to NBA Finals? MSG says presidents, 'no matter who,' welcome
shortDescription: President Trump has said he was invited by "numerous" people, including James Dolan. Here's what to know.

title: White House pays tribute to Harambe. See the reactions
shortDescription: Harambe was a gorilla who was killed at the Cincinnati Zoo 10 years ago after a child fell into his enclosure. The internet still has feelings.

title: Talarico hauls in $3M after Paxton wins Texas Senate GOP runoff
shortDescription: Democrat James Talarico raised more than $3M in 24 hours after Paxton's runoff win, his campaign's biggest single-day haul.

title: Rogan isn't thrilled about UFC White House fights happening outdoors
shortDescription: Joe Rogan thinks it's a bad idea for UFC Freedom 250 to have title fights taking place "in a non-controlled environment" outdoors at the White House.

title: Iowa's first-caucus pitch faces skepticism from national Democrats
shortDescription: Illinois and Michigan are competing with Iowa to hold the first 2028 presidential primary in the Midwest.

title: Jill Biden feared a stroke during Joe Biden debate
shortDescription: Jill Biden says she feared Joe Biden was having a stroke while watching his June 2024 debate against Donald Trump.

title: Talarico reacts to Paxton's nomination for US Senate
shortDescription: Democratic state Rep. James Talarico shared a video to social media Tuesday night reacting to Texas AG Ken Paxton being nominated as his opponent for the November election.

title: Springsteen calls Trump 'racist, incompetent' in Washington DC concert
shortDescription: Iconic rocker Bruce Springsteen, a vocal critic of Donald Trump, went on a long rant about the president during a concert at Nationals Park in DC.

title: Judge allows Trump voting order to proceed
shortDescription: A U.S. judge has allowed Trump to implement his mail-in voting executive order, a loss for Democrats after lawyers argued the order could disenfranchise millions of voters.

title: Ohio Supreme Court says state must revisit solar farm on Bill Gates' land
shortDescription: The Ohio Supreme Court has partially sided with local governments in a legal dispute about a solar project on land owned by Microsoft founder Bill Gates.

title: Judge allows Trump to implement mail-in voting executive order
shortDescription: A U.S. judge declined to block President Donald Trump's executive tightening rules on mail-in voting in a loss for the Democratic Party.

title: Dana White says UFC White House event is patriotic, not political
shortDescription: "You can make anything political if you want to," Dana White told Time magazine when asked if UFC Freedom 250 is an inherently political act.

title: Trump plans to attend Knicks NBA Finals game
shortDescription: President Trump says he plans to attend a New York Knicks game as the team returns to the finals for the first time since 1999.

title: California to impose 100% tax on Trump 'slush fund,' Newsom says
shortDescription: 'We want to tax 100% of those proceeds,' Newsom said of payments from President Donald Trump's 'anti-weaponization' fund.
